message:
fix: correct multiple logic bugs found in fresh-eyes code review

- secret_scanner.rs: Fix is_likely_base64 padding validation to correctly
  handle strings where length % 4 != 0 (was checking padding position wrong)
- secret_scanner.rs: Fix overlapping pattern matches causing duplicate
  [REDACTED] markers by sorting and deduplicating match ranges
- quality.rs: Fix operator precedence bug in has_tests_passed that caused
  && to bind tighter than || in status checks
- mining.rs: Fix patterns_are_similar to detect identical short code blocks
  (was incorrectly returning false for identical code <= 20 chars)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
